title: Hated Eoe like the official Eoe sucks facebook page
display_title: Hated Eoe like the official Eoe sucks facebook page
wikitext:
[]: Hated Eoe? like the official Eoe sucks facebook page Post by UBERGEEKZILLA » Thu Oct 25, 2012 2:42 pm http://www.facebook.com/pages/End-of-Evangelion-Sucks/203001376481738?ref=hl lets face it. some people really hated the way this show ended. if your one of them check out this page

[]: Post by esselfortium » Thu Oct 25, 2012 3:11 pm I'm starting an official "the official EoE-sucks Facebook page sucks" Facebook page.

[]: Post by Pandymint » Thu Oct 25, 2012 3:26 pm Personally I was quite satisfied with End of Evangelion. I like more depressing endings than happy, typical endings. Just not my style. And a show like Evangelion shouldn't end on a happy note. It'd just be a sour taste in my mouth.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Oct 25, 2012 3:31 pm Personally I have come to dislike EoE's ending over time but I always disliked Facebook too, so that page is of no interest to me unfortunately.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Oct 25, 2012 3:36 pm Not having Facebook, this is not even relevant to me. And though EoE was not the ending I had been looking for after the TV ending, if it hadn't sunk its emotional fishhooks in me, I wouldn't have become so involved with the fandom. And I wouldn't have two different good ends

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Oct 25, 2012 3:38 pm esselfortium wrote: I'm starting an official "the official EoE-sucks Facebook page sucks" Facebook page.

[]: Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Oct 25, 2012 3:50 pm The EoE was a great way to end it all. plus I've never seen the point of any hate group so this is no exception.

[]: Post by Clover » Thu Oct 25, 2012 3:58 pm I guess it's just too deep for you.

[]: Post by Jayfive » Thu Oct 25, 2012 4:01 pm Uh-huh, because its worth spending this much time over a movie over 10 years old. 4 likes. I got more than that on a post about my night out last saturday. Not exactly shaking up the status quo. Let them get on with it.

[]: Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Oct 25, 2012 4:03 pm The thing with Evangelion is that there are only two ways to end the series, 1 is a soft ending (tv series ending) that leaves a lot of questions and people scratching their heads 2. a tank through the front door ending (EoE) where questions are left and people are left shell shocked. Honestly although I prefer NGE to EoE, Its nice to go out with a bang.

[]: Post by Xard » Thu Oct 25, 2012 5:07 pm It's sad that even in Eva fandom there's people for whom EoE is 2deep4me

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 25, 2012 5:46 pm esselfortium wrote: I'm starting an official "the official EoE-sucks Facebook page sucks" Facebook page.

[]: Post by Stryker » Thu Oct 25, 2012 5:47 pm inb4lock I'm terrible

[]: Post by Dream » Thu Oct 25, 2012 6:19 pm So i guess i must be one of the few people who actually thought EoE was beautiful, even in the ending (or specially in the ending)

[]: Post by Fireball » Thu Oct 25, 2012 6:23 pm I want /soc/ to leave.

[]: Post by Pandymint » Thu Oct 25, 2012 6:58 pm Dream wrote: So i guess i must be one of the few people who actually thought EoE was beautiful, even in the ending (or specially in the ending)

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 25, 2012 7:02 pm How about instead of liking this waste of a Facebook page you like my site's page instead? http://www.facebook.com/pages/Eva-Monkey-an-Evangelion-Fan-Website/117694171642703

[]: Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Oct 25, 2012 7:07 pm Done.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Oct 25, 2012 7:14 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: How about instead of liking this waste of a Facebook page you like my site's page instead?

[]: Post by Pandymint » Thu Oct 25, 2012 7:33 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: Done.
